Video.summary: Aisha claims Antwan harassed her and posted an explicit photo of her on social media without her permission.
Video.title: A Scantily Clad Suit

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that, two years ago, her mother confessed that the defendant may be her biological father, so she has petitioned the court for a paternity test.
Video.title: Are You My Father?

Video.summary: Jamar and Dana sue Marlene and Myriah for $1,200 after a failed puppy deal. They claim Marlene reneged on giving them puppies as agreed. Marlene argues the pups were gifts and refuses to comply.
Video.title: Dog Mating Disaster

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: Plaintiff rented a room from the defendant; he's suing for the return of his security deposit.
Video.title: Room for Rent

Video.summary: A lie detector test could decide the fate of Andrecia and Alfred's tumultuous marriage filled with suspicion and regret.
Video.title: Taylor vs. Taylor

Video.summary: Past infidelity and the discovery of a homoerotic dating profile have husband and wife Laffiama and Amy feuding in court.
Video.title: Murillo vs. Murillo

Video.summary: Tensions run high in the courtroom as Gayla and James decide if they should call off their wedding.
Video.title: Williams vs. Edwards

Video.summary: The results of a double polygraph determine the future of newlyweds Sierra and Victor's marriage.
Video.title: Buckner vs. Banks

Video.summary: A devastating revelation proves that love truly is blind in Sharise and Edson's relationship.
Video.title: Bowie vs. Segarra

Video.summary: Malu sues her girlfriend, L'Mika, because she failed to repay her for a loan and, instead, went on a cruise without her.
Video.title: Mejilla vs. Kargbo

Video.summary: Pye sues ex-boyfriend Santiel for the return of her safe keys, saying stole them post-breakup.
Video.title: Powell-Woods vs. Chambers

Video.summary: After tolerating his gambling and smoking addictions for three-and-a-half years, Deja issues boyfriend Marcus an ultimatum.
Video.title: McKinny vs. Everett

Video.summary: Terran delivers an ultimatum after he suspects girlfriend Nia of cheating based on her sexually explicit rap lyrics.
Video.title: Eaton vs. Henderson

Video.summary: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Hudson

Video.summary: In an emotional case, Fi and Kee seek to answer questions surrounding sexuality and loyalty with a polygraph test.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Walls

Video.summary: California model Nicole sues her ex-boyfriend Peter for property exchange of their pet dog that he kept after the breakup.
Video.title: Serrano vs. Plemons

Video.summary: Teresa issues ex-boyfriend Keita an ultimatum: agree to consistent co-parenting or start paying child support.
Video.title: Jefferson vs. Singleton

Video.summary: An 11-year age difference and an aborted pregnancy put Illinois couple Shakia and Leontae in a power struggle.
Video.title: Yancy vs. Spaulding

Video.summary: Jacoby isn’t so happy about Amber’s business success and called off the wedding. A compatibility test decides their future.
Video.title: Rouzan vs Lunkins

Video.summary: Sade confronts her boyfriend, Jeremy, in court about his gambling addiction and bill money spent on lottery tickets.
Video.title: Black vs. Wiles

Video.summary: A man seeks justice for stolen property and unpaid debt while questioning his future with a distant girlfriend.
Video.title: Whitehurst vs. Briggs

Video.summary: Rachel must answer for delaying her nuptials to fiance Blaine after he stuck with her through her prison stint.
Video.title: Cerre vs. Hardy

Video.summary: An Atlanta couple struggle to find common ground while dealing with a party lifestyle and a string of broken promises.
Video.title: Ellis vs. McCray

Video.summary: Exes Caerya and James meet in court to settle a three-year debate over their son's paternity.
Video.title: Cox vs. Carswell

Video.summary: Terrell sues girlfriend Kristy for damages because he suspects she is using him for money.
Video.title: Marrow vs. Coleman

Video.summary: Natheefa sues her brother Clifford, accusing him of stealing her 55" TV and owing $4,750 in rent after abruptly moving out. Clifford claims he left due to household tensions and took his own belongings.
Video.title: My Brother Stole My TV

Video.summary: Monique and Joshua sue landlord Brandi for withholding their $350 deposit, claiming control issues and unfair treatment. Brandi counters, saying Monique’s son broke rules, caused trouble, and left the property damaged.
Video.title: Your House Is Haunted by a Ghost!

Image.alt: Your House Is Haunted by a Ghost!
Your House Is Haunted by a Ghost!
Your House Is Haunted by a Ghost!

Video.summary: Marva Utley sues Ed’s bakery for $1,500 after receiving a red velvet cake instead of the rum cake she ordered for her daughter's birthday. Ed claims it was a mix-up by a new employee and offered a refund, but Marva says the mistake ruined the party.
Video.title: Cake Catastrophe

Video.summary: Plaintiff Tien sues landlord Jeffrey for $2,450, claiming he broke his promise to refund her after she backed out of renting his house. Jeffrey insists he doesn’t owe more, saying he already refunded most of the money and was left covering costs.
Video.title: Rental Ruckus

Video.summary: A woman says the defendant began cheating on her after she got pregnant with his child; she sues him for unpaid child support; the defendant claims he has fallen on hard times since the pandemic.
Video.title: Broken Promises, Unpaid Dues

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her nail tech Jonyell after paying her to take a nail class but she breached their contract.
Video.title: Getting Nailed for Class Tuition

Video.summary: Raven says her friend started hooking up with her ex while they were in Las Vegas, so she's suing for the trip
Video.title: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Image.alt: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Video.summary: A man says his ex vandalized his van, and while they were dating, she punched him in the face and ended up in jail.
Video.title: Trading Punches

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that after her 9-year-old son passed away, she became addicted to heroin but has been clean for 30 years; she is suing her former friend for repayment of a loan, while the ex-friend denies owing her for anything.
Video.title: Past Bonds and Present Debts

Video.summary: Sherman is suing is ex-wife because he claims during their marriage she cheated on him with his best friend.
Video.title: Threatening an Ex

Video.summary: Barbara sues Emilio's strip club for $30,000, alleging negligence and emotional distress. She claims whiplash from Jackson's performance and a collapsing chair. Emilio denies responsibility, citing safety and Barbara's drinking.
Video.title: Tornado Tassel

Video.summary: Damien sues Sal for $35 million, alleging Sal's car service ruined his marrage by dropping his wife at his mistress' house. Sal denies fault, prioritizing business growth.
Video.title: Car Service Scandals

Video.summary: Jonah sues ex-friend Elliot for $25,000, defamation, and IP theft, aiming to disband "The Wizarding Warband." Elliot disputes, blaming Jonah's leadership for league decline.
Video.title: Battle Royale

Video.summary: Evelyn sues Dexter for $500K, saying he tricked her into leaving her marriage, causing financial ruin and distress. Dexter denies, saying she pursued him as a gold digger.
Video.title: For Love or Money

Video.summary: Guillermo Logan sues Nancy Grant for $5M, alleging false imprisonment and mental anguish after getting trapped by her security system during a burglary. Nancy defends her system due to past burglaries and questions Guillermo's criminal history.
Video.title: Caught in the Act

Video.summary: The Wilsons sue Sean Moore, Ballpark Bandits sponsor, for $10,000. Their son got fired mid-season, Sean blames Kevin's erratic behavior and Laurie for fostering negativity and intimidating parents.
Video.title: Little League, Big Problems

Video.summary: Samantha sues Elizabeth and PI Ricardo for $40,000 over false accusations. Elizabeth hired Ricardo to investigate Samantha's husband but wrongly accused Samantha. Samantha claims harassment, and defamation. Elizabeth and Ricardo deny responsibility.
Video.title: Shadows of Doubt

Video.summary: Ariana Garcia, 19, is suing her parents for refusal to acknowledge and respect her privacy and boundaries.
Video.title: Baby Blues

Video.summary: Michael Brown sues Victor Hernandez, "Savage Skin" tattoo shop owner, for $50,000, alleging Victor maliciously altered his tattoo design due to a grudge over dating Victor's ex, causing an embarrassing tattoo. Victor says it's a misunderstanding.
Video.title: Ink Is Best Served Cold

Video.summary: Wilbur and his wife are suing his sister, Jennifer, after their son was left out of their grandmother's will.
Video.title: Will-fully Repugnant

Video.summary: Annie sues ex-best friend Olivia for $150K emotional distress. Olivia, once maid of honor, hijacked wedding plans, changing venue and dresses. Annie feels betrayed, removed Olivia from bridal party. Olivia defends, says she improved wedding.
Video.title: Nuptial Nemesis
